steps.title: Simplify inside the parentheses
steps.content: Combine the like terms inside the parentheses first:$$4w+3w=7w$$So the expression becomes $20w-7w$.

steps.title: Compare with each choice
steps.content:
• A) $10w$: would require $20w-10w$, but we have $20w-7w$. Eliminated.
  • B) $13w$: equals $20w-7w$. Matches.
  • C) $19w$: would require subtracting only $w$, not $7w$. Eliminated.
  • D) $21w$: larger than $20w$, but subtraction makes the value smaller. Eliminated.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
